task_completion.description: Verify the telescope is configured to point at the correct target (HD 189733).
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the KStars sky map or Ekos mount module showing the telescope tracking or pointing to HD 189733.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct filter (Slot 2 / V-band) is selected for the observation.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos capture module or filter wheel settings showing 'Slot 2' or 'V' (V-band) selected.

task_completion.description: Verify the focuser is set to the required defocus position of approximately 30500.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos focus module showing the absolute focuser position set to a value near 30500 (between 30300 and 30700).

task_completion.description: Verify a time-series imaging sequence was conducted with at least 15 captures.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the Ekos capture module showing a sequence queue with a count of at least 15, or a file manager/terminal showing at least 15 FITS files generated in the target directory.

task_completion.description: Verify the sky view image was saved to the correct path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an image viewer, file manager, or terminal showing the file 'sky_view.png' located in '~/Images/transits/hd189733b/'.

task_completion.description: Verify the ETD-compatible transit observation log was produced.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a text editor, file manager, or terminal showing the file 'transit_log.txt' located in '~/Documents/' containing observation data.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the KStars/Ekos GUI to configure the observatory.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the KStars application and Ekos modules open and being interacted with, rather than just terminal commands editing configuration files.

integrity.description: Verify the imaging sequence was actually executed within the software.
integrity.visual_evidence: Look for progress bars, active capture status, or completed sequence logs in the Ekos capture module, proving the FITS files were not just mocked via terminal commands.

integrity.description: Verify the sky view image is a genuine export or screenshot from the KStars software.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 'sky_view.png' image should visually match the KStars sky map interface showing the target area, not a generic downloaded image of space.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Verified facts for the VLM verifier: The target is HD 189733. The required filter is Slot 2 (V-band). The required defocus position is 30500 (acceptable range 30300-30700). The imaging sequence must capture a minimum of 15 FITS files. The sky view must be saved to /home/ga/Images/transits/hd189733b/sky_view.png. The transit log must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/transit_log.txt.
